description_long: This is a ceramic cup featuring a vibrant, anime-themed design with prominent orange, black, and white colors. The exterior is decorated with dynamic illustrations of a character from the Naruto Shippuden series, including stylized clouds and the iconic red swirl symbol. The cup has a rounded body with a slightly irregular rim and a sturdy, curved handle attached to one side. The artwork wraps around the cup, with the main character and text visible on the front and side, while the back displays more of the background pattern. The surface appears glossy and smooth, typical of glazed ceramic kitchenware. The interior is likely plain and functional, suitable for holding liquids.
description: A glossy ceramic cup with a Naruto Shippuden anime design, featuring bold orange and black artwork and a curved handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main Naruto character, bold orange background, and the handle clearly visible on the right.
description_view_1: Side/rear view with the handle in the center, less of the main character visible, and more of the background pattern.
description_view_2: Side view with the 'Naruto Shippuden' text and partial character artwork, handle on the left edge.
description_view_3: Back view showing mostly the orange background, swirl symbol, and minimal character detail, handle barely visible.
